title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: The presenter explores strange deaths that include a 25-foot tidal wave of molasses, a dancing plague and a surgery with a 300 per cent mortality rate.

title: Mahakaleshwar: Legends of Shiva
desc: The host sheds light on the legends and rituals surrounding the Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga and its association with Mahakala, a manifestation of Shiva.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Jenn learns that Roy Garber's famous dialogue was more than a catchphrase when she's tasked with transporting a load that was once shipped by the legend.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Kenny finds inspiration in a friend's strategy as buyers swarm San Bernardino. Meanwhile, Brandi shows her strength on a dusty locker.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Brandi exercises restraint, aiming to secure a locker victory. Meanwhile, Rene discovers a stack of intriguing items that catch his eye.

title: A Taste of Travel
desc: Alana departs Budapest and bikes through the Hungarian countryside. Meanwhile, Scotty checks out Coffs Harbour's world heritage forests and Skye visits Appellation in the Barossa Valley.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Four bladesmiths face a cleaver challenge with meat hook steel, while two finalists forge a formidable Maguro Bocho tuna knife for the win.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Marc is weighed down by a load that might just be more than the Boar can tackle. Meanwhile, Dusty gets stuck hauling some very unique art sculptures.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: Explore a magical plant birthed at Uttar Pradesh that bears two different vegetables. Also, meet Iqbal Sakka, an artist from Udaipur who crafts miniature articles out of gold.

title: Special Operations: India Surgical Strike
desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the planning and execution of the surgical strikes carried out by the Indian army and interacts with various renowned personalities related to defence.

title: India: Marvels & Mysteries With William Dalrymple
desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

title: The Einstein Challenge
desc: Egyptologists Willa Snowbender and Dr Kate Liszka unravel ancient Egyptian mysteries. Additionally, they decode hieroglyphics and explain mummification processes.

title: Born to be Wild
desc: Andrew travels to South America, where he spends a month living alone in the Amazon rainforest of Peru in order to find as many animals as he can.

title: Nature Gone Wild
desc: An impala finds unlikely escape from a cheetah, a skier gets buried alive and a paraglider gets into a conflict with a kangaroo.

title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
desc: The bladesmiths, martial artists and knife thrower who survived the intimidating course are back to prove their skills in the final showdown.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host visits the most patriotic village of India in Andhra Pradesh, watches the country's fastest stuntman on his Bullet bike and enters India's first cat cafe.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Brandi exercises restraint, aiming to secure a locker victory. Meanwhile, Rene discovers a stack of intriguing items that catch his eye.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Danny plans to flip a 1972 Cutlass. Meanwhile, Roli seeks the guys' help to master doing a burnout. Later, Danny examines a 1971 Torino.

desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

title: Flavours of Punjab
desc: The filmmaker highlights the vibrant culture, delicious food and beautiful landscapes of Punjab, the land of five rivers.

title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
desc: The inmates ally to dig escape tunnels from a German prisoner of war camp. However, leaving only three free, the rest end up recaptured or executed.
